name: The House Kamal Adli & Uqasha Senrose
original_name: The House Kamal Adli & Uqasha Senrose
overview: Kamal Adli and Uqasha Senrose opt to go on a unique caravan honeymoon road trip, a decision that leads to numerous adventures, discoveries and conflicts. The drama peaks nearing the end of the trip when the couple decide to invite their families to join them too.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER | The House Kamal & Uqasha
